description: Letter fragment in a familiar hand from the circle of Avraham Maimonides (who might be sayyidnā mentioned in the margins). The portion preserved mainly consists of greetings for Abū l-Faraj; al-Kohen Yaʿqūb and his brother and father; al-Raṣuy; al-Thiqa; R. Ḥananʾel (probably b. Shemuel); and Sayyidnā. AA
